chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D- 360 of 2020 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Disposed of case 1. For hearing of CMA No.1159/2024 (Replacing Surety) 2. For orders on CMA No.2654/2024 (151 CPC) 16.05.2024 Mr. Deedar Ali M. Chohan, Advocate for applicant/surety Mr. Najamuddin Dharejo, Special Prosecutor NAB Mr. Ashfaque Hussain Abro, Assistant Attorney General for Pakistan >>>>>..<<<<< 1. Dismissed as not pressed. 2. With consent, this application is allowed. Let fresh surety be submitted first by the petitioner to the satisfaction of Nazir of this Court at Karachi in terms of orders dated 25.06.2019 and 17.03.2021. And only after acceptance of fresh surety, current surety be allowed to be withdrawn and returned to the surety after due verification and identification as per rules. The application is disposed of accordingly Judge Judge ARBROHI
